```{r}
# BAGIAN 0 : SETUP - INSTALASI & LOAD PACKAGE
set.seed(42)
options(repos = c(CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"))
options(repr.plot.width = 12, repr.plot.height = 7, repr.plot.res = 150)

required_packages <- c(
  "readr", "dplyr", "tidyr", "stringr", "ggplot2",
  "reshape2", "markovchain", "igraph", "RColorBrewer",
  "scales", "gridExtra", "knitr"
)

cat("Memeriksa dan memuat package...\n")
for (pkg in required_packages) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) install.packages(pkg, quiet = TRUE)
  suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(pkg, character.only = TRUE))
}
cat("Semua package berhasil dimuat.\n\n")

dir.create("output_markov", showWarnings = FALSE)
cat("Semua output tersimpan di: ./output_markov/\n\n")

sep_line <- function(n = 70, ch = "=") cat(strrep(ch, n), "\n")

mat_power <- function(A, n) {
  if (n == 0L) return(diag(nrow(A)))
  if (n == 1L) return(A)
  if (n %% 2L == 0L) { B <- mat_power(A, n %/% 2L); return(B %*% B) }
  return(A %*% mat_power(A, n - 1L))
}
```

```{r}
# ================================
# BAGIAN 1 : LOAD & PREPROCESSING DATA
# ================================

sep_line <- function() cat("\n", paste(rep("=",60), collapse=""), "\n")

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)

sep_line(); cat("BAGIAN 1 : LOAD & PREPROCESSING DATA\n"); sep_line()

# Path file Excel
FILE_PATH <- "D:/FILE AND TASK/TUGAS KULIAH/PemStok/TUBES/Kuesioner Penelitian Mobilitas Mahasiswa ITERA (Tugas Besar Pemodelan Stokastik - Kelompok 5) (Responses).xlsx"

# Load data Excel
df_raw <- read_excel(FILE_PATH)

cat(sprintf("Data dimuat: %d responden, %d kolom\n\n",
            nrow(df_raw), ncol(df_raw)))

# Rename kolom
names(df_raw) <- c(
  "timestamp", "email", "nama", "prodi", "angkatan",
  "hari", "t1_0709", "t2_0911", "t3_1113",
  "t4_1315", "t5_1517"
)

df <- df_raw

# Fungsi ekstrak zona S1-S5
extract_zone <- function(x) str_extract(x, "S[1-5]")

# Membentuk kolom zona
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    z1   = extract_zone(t1_0709),
    z2   = extract_zone(t2_0911),
    z3   = extract_zone(t3_1113),
    z4   = extract_zone(t4_1315),
    z5   = extract_zone(t5_1517),
    hari = str_trim(hari)
  )

# ================================
# CHECK MISSING VALUE
# ================================

cat("--- Missing Values per Slot Waktu ---\n")

mv <- df %>%
  select(z1:z5) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~sum(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to  = "Slot",
    values_to = "NA_count"
  )

print(as.data.frame(mv))

# Hapus baris yang memiliki NA
n_before <- nrow(df)

df <- df %>%
  filter(if_all(z1:z5, ~ !is.na(.)))

cat(sprintf(
  "\nBaris dihapus (ada NA): %d | Sisa: %d responden\n\n",
  n_before - nrow(df),
  nrow(df)
))

# ================================
# DEFINISI STATE
# ================================

STATES <- c("S1", "S2", "S3", "S4", "S5")

LABELS <- c(
  "S1-Akademik",
  "S2-FasilitasUmum",
  "S3-Ibadah",
  "S4-Makan",
  "S5-LuarKampus"
)

LABELS_FULL <- c(
  "S1 (Area Akademik)",
  "S2 (Area Fasilitas Umum & Kemahasiswaan)",
  "S3 (Area Ibadah)",
  "S4 (Area Makan)",
  "S5 (Luar Kampus)"
)

SLOT_LABELS <- c(
  "07-09",
  "09-11",
  "11-13",
  "13-15",
  "15-17"
)

STEP_LABELS <- c(
  "07-09->09-11",
  "09-11->11-13",
  "11-13->13-15",
  "13-15->15-17"
)

N_STATES <- 5L
N <- nrow(df)

# ================================
# MEMBENTUK DATA TRANSISI
# ================================

df_trans <- bind_rows(
  lapply(1:4, function(k) {
    
    df %>%
      transmute(
        nama,
        hari,
        from       = .data[[paste0("z", k)]],
        to         = .data[[paste0("z", k + 1)]],
        step       = k,
        step_label = STEP_LABELS[k]
      )
  })
)

cat(sprintf(
  "Total transisi: %d (%d responden x 4 transisi)\n\n",
  nrow(df_trans),
  N
))

# Preview data transisi
head(df_trans)
```

```{r}
# BAGIAN 3 : FUNGSI PEMBANTU
#
build_freq_matrix <- function(from_vec, to_vec, states = STATES) {
  mat <- matrix(0L, nrow=length(states), ncol=length(states),
                dimnames=list(states, states))
  valid <- !is.na(from_vec) & !is.na(to_vec) &
    from_vec %in% states & to_vec %in% states
  for (k in which(valid))
    mat[from_vec[k], to_vec[k]] <- mat[from_vec[k], to_vec[k]] + 1L
  mat
}

freq_to_prob <- function(freq_mat) {
  rs <- rowSums(freq_mat)
  rs[rs == 0L] <- 1L
  sweep(freq_mat, 1, rs, "/")
}
```

```{r}
# BAGIAN 4 : MATRIKS FREKUENSI
# ==============================================================================

sep_line(); cat("BAGIAN 4 : MATRIKS FREKUENSI\n"); sep_line()

N_agg <- build_freq_matrix(df_trans$from, df_trans$to)
cat("\n--- Matriks Frekuensi Agregat N_ij ---\n")
cat("    (baris = zona asal, kolom = zona tujuan)\n\n")
N_agg_print <- N_agg
rownames(N_agg_print) <- LABELS_FULL
colnames(N_agg_print) <- STATES
print(N_agg_print)
cat(sprintf("\nTotal: %d transisi\n", sum(N_agg)))

freq_per_step <- setNames(
  lapply(1:4, function(k) {
    sub <- df_trans %>% filter(step == k)
    build_freq_matrix(sub$from, sub$to)
  }), STEP_LABELS
)
cat("\n--- Frekuensi per Slot Waktu ---\n")
for (nm in names(freq_per_step)) {
  cat(sprintf("\nSlot %s (n=%d):\n", nm, sum(freq_per_step[[nm]])))
  print(freq_per_step[[nm]])
}

days <- sort(unique(df$hari))
freq_per_day <- setNames(
  lapply(days, function(d) {
    sub <- df_trans %>% filter(hari == d)
    build_freq_matrix(sub$from, sub$to)
  }), days
)
cat("\n--- Total Transisi per Hari ---\n")
for (d in days) cat(sprintf("  %-10s: %d\n", d, sum(freq_per_day[[d]])))
cat("\n")
```

```{r}
# ================================
# BAGIAN 5 : UJI ASUMSI
# ================================

# Fungsi garis pemisah
sep_line <- function(n = 60, char = "=") {
  cat("\n", paste(rep(char, n), collapse = ""), "\n")
}

sep_line()
cat("BAGIAN 5 : UJI ASUMSI\n")
sep_line()

# =========================================================
# 5.1 UJI HOMOGENITAS ANTAR SLOT WAKTU
# =========================================================

sep_line(50, "-")
cat("[5.1] Uji Homogenitas Antar Slot Waktu\n")
cat("      H0: Matriks transisi seragam di semua slot waktu\n")
cat("      H1: Ada perbedaan matriks transisi antar slot waktu\n")
sep_line(50, "-")

set.seed(42)

chi2_total <- 0
df_total   <- 0
hasil_5_1  <- list()

for (s in STATES) {

  cnt <- t(sapply(freq_per_step, function(m) {

    if (s %in% rownames(m)) {
      m[s, STATES]
    } else {
      setNames(rep(0L, N_STATES), STATES)
    }

  }))

  cnt <- cnt[, colSums(cnt) > 0L, drop = FALSE]
  cnt <- cnt[rowSums(cnt) > 0L, , drop = FALSE]

  if (nrow(cnt) >= 2L && ncol(cnt) >= 2L) {

    tst <- chisq.test(
      cnt,
      simulate.p.value = TRUE,
      B = 5000L
    )

    df_i <- (nrow(cnt) - 1L) * (ncol(cnt) - 1L)

    sig <- if (tst$p.value < 0.05) {
      "  * BERBEDA SIGNIFIKAN"
    } else {
      ""
    }

    cat(sprintf(
      "  State %-3s | chi2 = %7.3f | p = %.4f%s\n",
      s,
      tst$statistic,
      tst$p.value,
      sig
    ))

    hasil_5_1[[s]] <- list(
      chi2 = tst$statistic,
      p    = tst$p.value
    )

    chi2_total <- chi2_total + tst$statistic
    df_total   <- df_total + df_i

  } else {

    cat(sprintf(
      "  State %-3s | data tidak cukup\n",
      s
    ))

  }
}

p_gab <- pchisq(
  chi2_total,
  df_total,
  lower.tail = FALSE
)

cat(sprintf(
  "\n  Gabungan: chi2 = %.3f | df = %d | p = %.4f\n",
  chi2_total,
  df_total,
  p_gab
))

cat("\nKESIMPULAN:\n")

if (p_gab < 0.05) {

  cat("Tolak H0 -> Matriks transisi TIDAK homogen antar slot waktu.\n")
  cat("Penelitian tetap menggunakan matriks agregat sebagai pendekatan simplifikasi.\n")
  cat("Hal ini dicatat sebagai keterbatasan penelitian.\n\n")

} else {

  cat("Gagal tolak H0 -> Asumsi time-homogeneity terpenuhi.\n\n")

}

# =========================================================
# 5.2 UJI INDEPENDENSI ANTAR HARI
# =========================================================

sep_line(50, "-")
cat("[5.2] Uji Independensi Antar Hari\n")
cat("      H0: Pola transisi seragam di semua hari kuliah\n")
cat("      H1: Pola transisi berbeda antar hari\n")
sep_line(50, "-")

days <- unique(df$hari)

if (length(days) >= 2L) {

  tbl_hari <- df_trans %>%
    mutate(pair = paste0(from, to)) %>%
    count(hari, pair) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from  = pair,
      values_from = n,
      values_fill = 0L
    )

  mat_hari <- as.matrix(tbl_hari[, -1L])

  rownames(mat_hari) <- tbl_hari$hari

  mat_hari <- mat_hari[
    ,
    colSums(mat_hari) > 0L,
    drop = FALSE
  ]

  tst_hari <- chisq.test(
    mat_hari,
    simulate.p.value = TRUE,
    B = 5000L
  )

  cat(sprintf(
    "\n  chi2 = %.3f | p = %.4f\n",
    tst_hari$statistic,
    tst_hari$p.value
  ))

  if (tst_hari$p.value < 0.05) {

    cat("Tolak H0 -> Pola transisi berbeda antar hari.\n")
    cat("Dicatat sebagai keterbatasan penelitian.\n\n")

  } else {

    cat("Gagal tolak H0 -> Penggabungan data lintas hari valid.\n\n")

  }

} else {

  cat("Hanya terdapat 1 hari observasi -> uji tidak dilakukan.\n\n")

}

# =========================================================
# 5.3 UJI ORDE MARKOV
# =========================================================

sep_line(50, "-")
cat("[5.3] Uji Orde Markov (Orde-1 vs Orde-2)\n")
cat("      H0: Rantai berorde-1 (Markov Property berlaku)\n")
cat("      H1: Rantai berorde-2 (historis 2 langkah lebih informatif)\n")
sep_line(50, "-")

df_triple <- bind_rows(

  lapply(1:3, function(k) {

    df %>%
      transmute(
        s_prev = .data[[paste0("z", k)]],
        s_curr = .data[[paste0("z", k + 1)]],
        s_next = .data[[paste0("z", k + 2)]]
      )

  })

) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(s_prev),
    !is.na(s_curr),
    !is.na(s_next)
  )

# Frekuensi triple dan pasangan state

n_ijk <- df_triple %>%
  count(s_prev, s_curr, s_next)

n_ij <- df_triple %>%
  count(s_prev, s_curr)

n_jk <- df_triple %>%
  count(s_curr, s_next)

n_j <- df_triple %>%
  count(s_curr)

# Likelihood Ratio Test (G²)

n_joined <- n_ijk %>%

  left_join(
    n_ij,
    by = c("s_prev", "s_curr"),
    suffix = c("", ".ij")
  ) %>%

  left_join(
    n_jk,
    by = c("s_curr", "s_next"),
    suffix = c("", ".jk")
  ) %>%

  left_join(
    n_j,
    by = "s_curr",
    suffix = c("", ".j")
  ) %>%

  rename(
    n_triple    = n,
    n_pair      = n.ij,
    n_curr_next = n.jk,
    n_curr      = n.j
  ) %>%

  filter(n_triple > 0L) %>%

  mutate(
    E_ijk = n_pair * n_curr_next / n_curr,

    G2 = ifelse(
      E_ijk > 0,
      2 * n_triple * log(n_triple / E_ijk),
      0
    )
  )

G2_stat <- sum(n_joined$G2, na.rm = TRUE)

df_G2 <- N_STATES * (N_STATES - 1L)^2L

p_G2 <- pchisq(
  G2_stat,
  df_G2,
  lower.tail = FALSE
)

cat(sprintf(
  "\n  G2 = %.3f | df = %d | p = %.4f\n",
  G2_stat,
  df_G2,
  p_G2
))

if (p_G2 >= 0.05) {

  cat("Gagal tolak H0 -> Rantai ORDE-1 sudah memadai.\n")
  cat("Markov Property valid digunakan pada penelitian ini.\n\n")

} else {

  cat("Tolak H0 -> Data mengindikasikan orde > 1.\n")
  cat("Penelitian tetap menggunakan orde-1 sebagai pendekatan simplifikasi.\n\n")

}
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# BAGIAN 6 : MATRIKS PROBABILITAS TRANSISI [RM-1]
# =========================================================

sep_line()
cat("BAGIAN 6 : MATRIKS PROBABILITAS TRANSISI - Menjawab RM-1\n")
sep_line()

# =========================================================
# MEMBENTUK MATRKS PROBABILITAS TRANSISI AGREGAT
# =========================================================

P_agg <- freq_to_prob(N_agg)

rownames(P_agg) <- STATES
colnames(P_agg) <- STATES

cat("\n--- Matriks Probabilitas Transisi P (5x5, Agregat) ---\n")
cat("    P[i,j] = P(berpindah ke zona j | saat ini di zona i)\n\n")

P_print <- P_agg

rownames(P_print) <- LABELS_FULL
colnames(P_print) <- STATES

print(round(P_print, 4))

# =========================================================
# VERIFIKASI SIFAT STOKASTIK
# =========================================================

cat("\n--- Verifikasi Sifat Stokastik (Jumlah Baris = 1) ---\n")

rs <- rowSums(P_agg)

for (i in seq_along(STATES)) {

  ok <- abs(rs[i] - 1.0) < 1e-9

  cat(sprintf(
    "  %s : %.10f [%s]\n",
    LABELS[i],
    rs[i],
    if (ok) "OK" else "GAGAL"
  ))
}

# =========================================================
# MEMBENTUK OBJEK MARKOV CHAIN
# =========================================================

mc_agg <- new(
  "markovchain",
  states           = STATES,
  transitionMatrix = P_agg,
  name             = "Mobilitas Mahasiswa ITERA"
)

cat("\n--- Objek Markov Chain ---\n")

show(mc_agg)

# =========================================================
# MATRKS TRANSISI PER SLOT WAKTU
# =========================================================

P_per_step <- setNames(
  lapply(freq_per_step, freq_to_prob),
  STEP_LABELS
)

cat("\n--- Matriks Probabilitas per Slot Waktu ---\n")

for (nm in names(P_per_step)) {

  cat(sprintf("\nP - Slot %s:\n", nm))

  print(round(P_per_step[[nm]], 3))
}

# =========================================================
# CUSTOM THEME GGPLOT
# =========================================================

theme_mk <- theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +

  theme(

    plot.title = element_text(
      face = "bold",
      size = 15,
      hjust = 0.5
    ),

    plot.subtitle = element_text(
      size = 11,
      hjust = 0.5
    ),

    axis.title = element_text(
      face = "bold"
    ),

    axis.text = element_text(
      color = "black"
    ),

    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),

    legend.title = element_text(
      face = "bold"
    ),

    legend.position = "right"
  )

# =========================================================
# PLOT 2 : HEATMAP MATRKS TRANSISI AGREGAT
# =========================================================

P_melt <- melt(
  P_agg,
  varnames  = c("From", "To"),
  value.name = "Prob"
) %>%

  mutate(

    label = ifelse(
      round(Prob, 3) > 0,
      sprintf("%.3f", Prob),
      "-"
    ),

    From = factor(
      From,
      levels = rev(STATES)
    ),

    To = factor(
      To,
      levels = STATES
    )
  )

p2 <- ggplot(
  P_melt,
  aes(x = To, y = From, fill = Prob)
) +

  geom_tile(
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +

  geom_text(
    aes(label = label),
    size = 3.8,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low       = "#FDFEFE",
    mid       = "#85C1E9",
    high      = "#1A5276",
    midpoint  = 0.35,
    limits    = c(0, 1),
    name      = "P(i→j)"
  ) +

  scale_x_discrete(
    labels = LABELS_FULL
  ) +

  scale_y_discrete(
    labels = rev(LABELS_FULL)
  ) +

  labs(
    title = "Matriks Probabilitas Transisi P (Agregat)",

    subtitle = sprintf(
      "P[i,j] = P(tujuan=j | asal=i), dari %d transisi",
      sum(N_agg)
    ),

    x = "Zona Tujuan (j)",
    y = "Zona Asal (i)"
  ) +

  theme_mk +

  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 30,
      hjust = 1,
      size = 9
    ),

    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 9
    ),

    plot.margin = margin(
      t = 15,
      r = 10,
      b = 10,
      l = 10
    )
  )

# Simpan heatmap agregat

ggsave(
  "output_markov/02_heatmap_transisi_agregat.png",
  p2,
  width = 9,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 150
)

print(p2)

cat("Disimpan: 02_heatmap_transisi_agregat.png\n")

# =========================================================
# PLOT 3 : HEATMAP MATRKS TRANSISI PER SLOT WAKTU
# =========================================================

plots3 <- lapply(seq_along(P_per_step), function(k) {

  nm <- names(P_per_step)[k]

  mlt <- melt(
    P_per_step[[k]],
    varnames  = c("From", "To"),
    value.name = "Prob"
  ) %>%

    mutate(

      From = factor(
        From,
        levels = rev(STATES)
      ),

      To = factor(
        To,
        levels = STATES
      )
    )

  ggplot(
    mlt,
    aes(x = To, y = From, fill = Prob)
  ) +

    geom_tile(
      color = "white",
      linewidth = 0.5
    ) +

    geom_text(
      aes(
        label = ifelse(
          Prob > 0.01,
          sprintf("%.2f", Prob),
          ""
        )
      ),
      size = 2.7
    ) +

    scale_fill_gradient(
      low   = "#FDFEFE",
      high  = "#C0392B",
      limits = c(0, 1),
      name = "P"
    ) +

    labs(
      title = sprintf("Slot %s", nm),
      x = NULL,
      y = NULL
    ) +

    theme_mk +

    theme(

      axis.text.x = element_text(
        angle = 45,
        hjust = 1,
        size = 7
      ),

      axis.text.y = element_text(
        size = 7
      ),

      plot.title = element_text(
        size = 10,
        margin = margin(b = 5)
      ),

      plot.margin = margin(
        t = 15,
        r = 10,
        b = 10,
        l = 10
      ),

      legend.position = "none"
    )
})

# Gabungkan plot

p3 <- arrangeGrob(

  grobs = plots3,

  ncol = 2,

  top = grid::textGrob(
    "Matriks Probabilitas Transisi per Slot Waktu\n",
    gp = grid::gpar(
      fontsize = 16,
      fontface = "bold"
    )
  )
)

# Simpan plot

ggsave(
  "output_markov/03_heatmap_per_slot_waktu.png",
  p3,
  width = 12,
  height = 10,
  dpi = 150
)

grid::grid.draw(p3)

cat("Disimpan: 03_heatmap_per_slot_waktu.png\n\n")
```

```{r}
# BAGIAN 7 : ANALISIS SIFAT RANTAI MARKOV
sep_line()
cat("BAGIAN 7 : ANALISIS SIFAT RANTAI MARKOV\n")
sep_line()

# =========================================================
# PALET WARNA ZONA
# =========================================================
pal <- c(
  S1 = "#1F77B4",  # Biru
  S2 = "#2CA02C",  # Hijau
  S3 = "#9467BD",  # Ungu
  S4 = "#FF7F0E",  # Orange
  S5 = "#D62728"   # Merah
)

# =========================================================
# [7.1] PROPERTI RANTAI
# =========================================================
cat("\n[7.1] Properti Rantai\n")

is_irr <- is.irreducible(mc_agg)
pd     <- period(mc_agg)

cat(sprintf("  Irreducible (semua state terhubung) : %s\n", is_irr))
cat(sprintf("  Period                              : %d\n", pd))
cat(sprintf("  Aperiodic (period = 1)              : %s\n", pd == 1L))
cat(sprintf("  Ergodic (irreducible & aperiodic)   : %s\n",
            is_irr && pd == 1L))

if (!is_irr) {
  warning("Rantai tidak irreducible - ada state terisolasi!")
}

# =========================================================
# [7.2] MATRIKS TRANSISI n-LANGKAH
# =========================================================
cat("\n[7.2] Matriks Transisi n-Langkah (P^n)\n")
cat("      Menggambarkan probabilitas setelah n transisi\n\n")

for (n_step in c(2L, 3L, 5L, 10L, 50L)) {

  Pn <- mat_power(P_agg, n_step)

  cat(sprintf("P^%d:\n", n_step))
  print(round(Pn, 4))
  cat("\n")
}

# =========================================================
# [7.3] KLASIFIKASI STATE
# =========================================================
cat("\n[7.3] Klasifikasi per State\n")
sep_line(50)

cat("  Karena rantai IRREDUCIBLE, semua state berada\n")
cat("  dalam satu communicating class dan bersifat recurrent.\n\n")

for (s in STATES) {
  cat(sprintf(
    "  %s : Recurrent | Communicating Class = {S1,S2,S3,S4,S5}\n",
    s
  ))
}

cat("\nKesimpulan Klasifikasi:\n")
cat("  - Semua state membentuk 1 communicating class tunggal\n")
cat("  - Semua state bersifat positive recurrent\n")
cat("  - Tidak ada transient state\n")
cat("  - Tidak ada absorbing state\n")
cat(sprintf(
  "  - Rantai bersifat ERGODIC (irreducible + aperiodic, period=%d)\n\n",
  pd
))

# =========================================================
# [7.4] VISUALISASI JARINGAN TRANSISI
# =========================================================
cat("[7.4] Visualisasi Jaringan Transisi\n\n")

EDGE_THR <- 0.05

edges_df <- as.data.frame(as.table(P_agg)) %>%
  rename(
    from   = Var1,
    to     = Var2,
    weight = Freq
  ) %>%
  filter(weight >= EDGE_THR)

g <- graph_from_data_frame(
  edges_df,
  directed = TRUE,
  vertices = data.frame(name = STATES)
)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# EDGE STYLE
# ---------------------------------------------------------
E(g)$width       <- E(g)$weight * 12
E(g)$label       <- sprintf("%.2f", E(g)$weight)
E(g)$label.cex   <- 0.75
E(g)$label.color <- "black"
E(g)$color       <- "gray50"
E(g)$arrow.size  <- 0.5

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# NODE STYLE
# ---------------------------------------------------------
V(g)$color       <- pal[V(g)$name]
V(g)$size        <- 35
V(g)$label       <- STATES
V(g)$label.color <- "white"
V(g)$label.cex   <- 0.9
V(g)$label.font  <- 2

# =========================================================
# SIMPAN GAMBAR
# =========================================================
png(
  filename = "output_markov/04_network_transisi.png",
  width    = 1200,
  height   = 1000,
  res      = 120
)

par(
  mar = c(8, 2, 4, 2),
  xpd = TRUE,
  bg  = "white"
)

plot(
  g,
  layout      = layout_in_circle(g),
  edge.curved = 0.2,
  main        = "Jaringan Transisi Antar Zona (P >= 5%)",
  cex.main    = 1.5
)

legend(
  "bottom",
  inset  = c(0, -0.2),
  legend = LABELS_FULL,
  fill   = pal,
  bty    = "n",
  cex    = 0.85,
  title  = "Keterangan Zona",
  ncol   = 2
)

dev.off()

cat("Disimpan: 04_network_transisi.png\n")

# =========================================================
# TAMPILKAN LANGSUNG DI PLOT WINDOW
# =========================================================
par(
  mar = c(8, 2, 4, 2),
  xpd = TRUE,
  bg  = "white"
)

plot(
  g,
  layout      = layout_in_circle(g),
  edge.curved = 0.2,
  main        = "Jaringan Transisi Antar Zona (P >= 5%)",
  cex.main    = 1.5
)

legend(
  "bottom",
  inset  = c(0, -0.2),
  legend = LABELS_FULL,
  fill   = pal,
  bty    = "n",
  cex    = 0.85,
  title  = "Keterangan Zona",
  ncol   = 2
)

cat("\n")
```

```{r}
# BAGIAN 8 : PROBABILITAS RETENSI [RM-2]
sep_line(); cat("BAGIAN 8 : RETENSI (SELF-TRANSITION) - Menjawab RM-2\n"); sep_line()

cat("\nP[i,i] = peluang mahasiswa TETAP di zona i pada slot berikutnya\n\n")

retensi        <- diag(P_agg)
names(retensi) <- STATES

ret_df <- data.frame(
  State  = STATES,
  Zona   = LABELS_FULL,
  P_ii   = retensi,
  Persen = round(retensi * 100, 2)
) %>% arrange(desc(P_ii))

cat("--- Tabel Retensi (Tertinggi -> Terendah) ---\n")
print(ret_df, row.names=FALSE)

cat(sprintf("\nZona retensi TERTINGGI : %s (P=%.4f / %.2f%%)\n",
            ret_df$State[1], ret_df$P_ii[1], ret_df$Persen[1]))
cat(sprintf("Zona retensi TERENDAH  : %s (P=%.4f / %.2f%%)\n",
            tail(ret_df$State,1), tail(ret_df$P_ii,1), tail(ret_df$Persen,1)))

cat("\n--- Retensi P[i,i] per Slot Waktu ---\n")
ret_step <- do.call(cbind, lapply(P_per_step, diag))
rownames(ret_step) <- LABELS_FULL
colnames(ret_step) <- STEP_LABELS
print(round(ret_step, 4))
cat("\n")

# ---- PLOT 5 : Retensi per zona (RM-2) ---------------------------------------
p5 <- ret_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=reorder(State,-P_ii), y=P_ii, fill=State)) +
  geom_col(width=0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label=sprintf("%.1f%%",Persen)), vjust=-0.4, size=4, fontface="bold") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1/N_STATES, linetype="dashed", color="grey50", linewidth=0.7) +
  annotate("text", x=0.6, y=1/N_STATES+0.03,
           label="Uniform\n(20%)", size=3, color="grey50") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=pal, guide="none") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=label_percent(), limits=c(0,1.1), breaks=seq(0,1,0.2)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels=LABELS_FULL) +
  labs(title="Probabilitas Retensi (Self-Transition) per Zona",
       subtitle="P[i,i] = peluang mahasiswa tetap di zona yang sama pada slot berikutnya",
       x="Zona", y="Probabilitas Retensi P[i,i]") +
  theme_mk +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=20, hjust=1))

ggsave("output_markov/05_retensi_per_zona.png", p5, width=9, height=6, dpi=150)
print(p5)
cat("Disimpan: 05_retensi_per_zona.png\n")

# ---- PLOT 9 : Heatmap retensi per zona per slot waktu (RM-2) ----------------
ret_long <- as.data.frame(ret_step) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Zona") %>%
  pivot_longer(-Zona, names_to="Slot", values_to="Retensi") %>%
  mutate(Zona=factor(Zona,levels=LABELS_FULL), Slot=factor(Slot,levels=STEP_LABELS))

p9 <- ggplot(ret_long, aes(x=Slot, y=Zona, fill=Retensi)) +
  geom_tile(color="white", linewidth=0.8) +
  geom_text(aes(label=sprintf("%.2f",Retensi)), size=3.8) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low="#FDFEFE", high="#27AE60", limits=c(0,1), name="P retensi") +
  labs(title="Probabilitas Retensi per Zona per Slot Waktu",
       subtitle="Hijau tua = mahasiswa cenderung menetap di zona tersebut",
       x="Slot Waktu", y="Zona") +
  theme_mk

ggsave("output_markov/09_retensi_per_slot_waktu.png", p9, width=9.5, height=5.5, dpi=150)
print(p9)
cat("Disimpan: 09_retensi_per_slot_waktu.png\n\n")
```

```{r}
# BAGIAN 9 : POLA PERPINDAHAN TERTINGGI [RM-3]
sep_line(); cat("BAGIAN 9 : POLA PERPINDAHAN ANTAR ZONA - Menjawab RM-3\n"); sep_line()

trans_all <- as.data.frame(as.table(P_agg)) %>%
  rename(From=Var1, To=Var2, Prob=Freq) %>%
  mutate(
    Tipe   = if_else(as.character(From)==as.character(To),
                     "Self-transition","Perpindahan antar zona"),
    Persen = round(Prob*100, 2)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(Prob))

cat("\n--- Top-10 Semua Transisi ---\n")
print(head(trans_all %>% select(From,To,Persen,Tipe), 10L), row.names=FALSE)

cat("\n--- Top-5 Perpindahan Antar Zona (self-transition dikecualikan) ---\n")
top_move <- trans_all %>% filter(Tipe=="Perpindahan antar zona") %>% head(5L)
print(top_move %>% select(From,To,Persen), row.names=FALSE)

cat("\n--- Top-3 dengan Probabilitas Tertinggi ---\n")
for (i in 1:3)
  cat(sprintf("  %d. %s -> %s (P=%.4f / %.2f%%)\n",
              i, top_move$From[i], top_move$To[i],
              top_move$Prob[i], top_move$Persen[i]))

cat("\n--- Matriks Antar-Zona (diagonal=0) ---\n")
P_off <- P_agg; diag(P_off) <- 0
print(round(P_off, 4))
cat("\n")

# ---- PLOT 8 : Top perpindahan antar zona - lollipop (RM-3) ------------------
top15 <- trans_all %>%
  filter(Tipe=="Perpindahan antar zona") %>%
  head(15L) %>%
  mutate(pair=paste0(From," -> ",To))

p8 <- ggplot(top15, aes(x=reorder(pair,Persen), y=Persen, color=From)) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend=pair, y=0, yend=Persen), linewidth=1.1) +
  geom_point(size=4) +
  geom_text(aes(label=sprintf("%.1f%%",Persen)), hjust=-0.3, size=3.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values=pal, labels=LABELS_FULL, name="Zona Asal") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title="Top-15 Probabilitas Perpindahan Antar Zona",
       subtitle="Self-transition (menetap di zona yang sama) dikecualikan",
       x=NULL, y="Probabilitas (%)") +
  theme_mk

ggsave("output_markov/08_top_perpindahan_antar_zona.png", p8, width=10, height=7, dpi=150)
print(p8)
cat("Disimpan: 08_top_perpindahan_antar_zona.png\n\n")
```

```{r}
# BAGIAN 10 : DISTRIBUSI STEADY-STATE [RM-4]
sep_line(); cat("BAGIAN 10 : DISTRIBUSI STEADY-STATE - Menjawab RM-4\n"); sep_line()

cat("\nInterpretasi: Jika pola ini berlanjut berulang (hari demi hari),\n")
cat("pi[i] = proporsi waktu jangka panjang di zona i.\n\n")

pi_mc <- steadyStates(mc_agg)
cat("[Metode 1] markovchain::steadyStates():\n")
pi_m1 <- as.numeric(pi_mc); names(pi_m1) <- LABELS
print(round(pi_m1, 6))

cat("\n[Metode 2] Eigen decomposition (verifikasi):\n")
ev    <- eigen(t(P_agg))
idx   <- which.min(abs(Re(ev$values) - 1.0))
pi_m2 <- abs(Re(ev$vectors[, idx])); pi_m2 <- pi_m2 / sum(pi_m2)
names(pi_m2) <- LABELS
print(round(pi_m2, 6))

cat("\n[Metode 3] P^500 (power iteration):\n")
pi_m3 <- mat_power(P_agg, 500L)[1L, ]; names(pi_m3) <- LABELS
print(round(pi_m3, 6))

pi_final <- pi_m2

ss_df <- data.frame(
  State  = STATES,
  Zona   = LABELS_FULL,
  Pi     = pi_final,
  Persen = round(pi_final * 100, 2)
) %>% arrange(desc(Pi)) %>% mutate(Rank = seq_len(n()))

cat("\n--- Distribusi Steady-State (Terurut) ---\n")
print(ss_df[, c("Rank","State","Zona","Pi","Persen")], row.names=FALSE)

pi_vec   <- as.numeric(pi_final)
pi_check <- as.numeric(pi_vec %*% P_agg)
cat("\nVerifikasi pi*P = pi:\n")
cat("  pi    :", round(pi_vec,   6), "\n")
cat("  pi*P  :", round(pi_check, 6), "\n")
cat(sprintf("  Maks. selisih: %.2e\n\n", max(abs(pi_check - pi_vec))))

cat(sprintf("Zona DOMINAN jangka panjang   : %s (pi=%.4f / %.1f%%)\n",
            ss_df$State[1], ss_df$Pi[1], ss_df$Persen[1]))
cat(sprintf("Zona PALING JARANG dikunjungi : %s (pi=%.4f / %.1f%%)\n\n",
            tail(ss_df$State,1), tail(ss_df$Pi,1), tail(ss_df$Persen,1)))

dist_init <- as.numeric(table(factor(df$z1, levels=STATES))) / N
names(dist_init) <- STATES
cat("Distribusi awal (slot 07-09):\n"); print(round(dist_init, 4))

evolve_dist <- function(pi0, P, n_steps) {
  res <- matrix(0.0, nrow=n_steps+1L, ncol=ncol(P))
  colnames(res) <- colnames(P)
  res[1L, ] <- pi0
  for (i in seq_len(n_steps)) res[i+1L, ] <- res[i, ] %*% P
  as.data.frame(res) %>% mutate(step=seq(0L, n_steps))
}

evo_df <- evolve_dist(dist_init, P_agg, 30L)
cat("\nEvolusi distribusi langkah 0-15:\n")
print(round(evo_df[1:16, ], 4))

# ---- PLOT 6 : Distribusi steady-state (RM-4) --------------------------------
p6 <- ss_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=reorder(State,-Pi), y=Pi, fill=State)) +
  geom_col(width=0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label=sprintf("%.1f%%",Persen)), vjust=-0.4, size=4, fontface="bold") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0.2, linetype="dashed", color="grey50", linewidth=0.7) +
  annotate("text", x=0.6, y=0.23, label="Uniform\n(20%)", size=3, color="grey50") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=pal, guide="none") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=label_percent(), limits=c(0,max(ss_df$Pi)*1.25)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels=LABELS_FULL) +
  labs(title="Distribusi Probabilitas Steady-State (pi)",
       subtitle="Prediksi distribusi jangka panjang - landasan evaluasi fasilitas kampus",
       x="Zona", y="Probabilitas Steady-State (pi)") +
  theme_mk +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=20, hjust=1))

ggsave("output_markov/06_steady_state.png", p6, width=9, height=6, dpi=150)
print(p6)
cat("Disimpan: 06_steady_state.png\n")

# ---- PLOT 7 : Evolusi distribusi menuju steady-state (RM-4) -----------------
evo_long <- evo_df %>%
  pivot_longer(-step, names_to="State", values_to="Prob") %>%
  mutate(State=factor(State, levels=STATES))
ss_lines <- data.frame(State=STATES, Pi=pi_final)

p7 <- ggplot(evo_long, aes(x=step, y=Prob, color=State)) +
  geom_line(linewidth=1) +
  geom_point(data=filter(evo_long, step==0L), size=3) +
  geom_hline(data=ss_lines, aes(yintercept=Pi, color=State),
             linetype="dashed", linewidth=0.55, alpha=0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values=pal, labels=LABELS_FULL, name="Zona") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(0,30,5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=label_percent()) +
  labs(title="Evolusi Distribusi Probabilitas Menuju Steady-State",
       subtitle="Titik awal: distribusi slot 07-09. Garis putus = nilai steady-state (pi)",
       x="Jumlah Langkah Transisi (n)", y="Probabilitas") +
  theme_mk

ggsave("output_markov/07_evolusi_steady_state.png", p7, width=11, height=6, dpi=150)
print(p7)
cat("Disimpan: 07_evolusi_steady_state.png\n")

# ---- PLOT 10 : Observasi vs Steady-State (RM-4) -----------------------------
obs_bar <- dist_slot %>%
  mutate(zona=factor(zona,levels=STATES), Prob=pct/100) %>%
  rename(State=zona) %>% select(slot, State, Prob)

ss_bar <- data.frame(
  slot  = "Steady-State\n(jangka panjang)",
  State = factor(STATES, levels=STATES),
  Prob  = pi_final
)

comb_bar <- bind_rows(obs_bar, ss_bar) %>%
  mutate(slot=factor(slot, levels=c(SLOT_LABELS,"Steady-State\n(jangka panjang)")))

p10 <- ggplot(comb_bar, aes(x=slot, y=Prob, fill=State)) +
  geom_col(position="stack", width=0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label=ifelse(Prob>=0.04, sprintf("%.1f%%",Prob*100),"")),
            position=position_stack(vjust=0.5),
            size=3, color="white", fontface="bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=pal, labels=LABELS_FULL, name="Zona") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=label_percent()) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=5.5, linetype="dashed", color="grey30", linewidth=0.7) +
  labs(title="Perbandingan Distribusi Observasi vs Steady-State",
       subtitle="Kolom ke-6 = prediksi distribusi jangka panjang (steady-state)",
       x=NULL, y="Proporsi Mahasiswa") +
  theme_mk

ggsave("output_markov/10_observasi_vs_steady_state.png", p10, width=12, height=6, dpi=150)
print(p10)
cat("Disimpan: 10_observasi_vs_steady_state.png\n\n")
```

```{r}
# RINGKASAN AKHIR
sep_line()
cat("RINGKASAN AKHIR - JAWABAN 4 RUMUSAN MASALAH\n")
sep_line()

cat("\n[RM-1] Matriks Probabilitas Transisi\n")
cat(sprintf("       Dihitung dari %d transisi (%d responden x 4 slot).\n", sum(N_agg), N))
cat("       Matriks P 5x5 valid (setiap baris = 1).\n")
cat("       Tersedia: versi agregat + 4 versi per-slot-waktu.\n")

cat("\n[RM-2] Zona dengan Retensi Tertinggi\n")
for (i in 1:nrow(ret_df))
  cat(sprintf("       %d. %-45s P[i,i]=%.4f (%.1f%%)\n",
              i, ret_df$Zona[i], ret_df$P_ii[i], ret_df$Persen[i]))

cat("\n[RM-3] Pola Perpindahan dengan Probabilitas Tertinggi\n")
for (i in 1:3)
  cat(sprintf("       %d. %s -> %s  P=%.4f (%.1f%%)\n",
              i, top_move$From[i], top_move$To[i],
              top_move$Prob[i], top_move$Persen[i]))

cat("\n[RM-4] Distribusi Steady-State\n")
for (i in seq_len(nrow(ss_df))) {
  bar <- strrep("|", max(1L, round(ss_df$Pi[i]*50)))
  cat(sprintf("       %-45s pi=%.4f (%.1f%%)  %s\n",
              ss_df$Zona[i], ss_df$Pi[i], ss_df$Persen[i], bar))
}
cat(sprintf("\n       Titik kumpul utama jangka panjang: %s (pi=%.4f)\n\n",
            ss_df$State[1], ss_df$Pi[1]))

cat("Output:\n")
cat("  Plot  : ./output_markov/*.png  (10 file)\n")
```
